understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) tile to win the level by navigating around hazards (spikes) within the step/turn budget, using clicks to remove breakable blocks and create fall paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (LEFT/RIGHT) are followed by automatic continuous movement in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y, UP toward higher y) until landing on a solid tile. Clicks remove breakable blocks without advancing turn counters. Landing on spikes causes immediate loss. Gravity direction determines fall trajectory.
